payload.title: [LOW] Rate-limit tenant key spoofable before tenant resolution
payload.description: rateLimitMiddleware (server.js:265) runs before any gate; getTenant uses req.query.project/workspace (unauthenticated selector) since req.tenantId is unset. Attacker sends authed requests with ?project=<victim> to fill the victim tenant's window => cross-tenant throttling. FIX: key the per-tenant limiter only after requireTenantRole sets req.tenantId, else fall back to acct:<id>.
